Audio.introBody: Soft background music, click sounds, and Animal Crossing-style readouts when you tap text. Open this speaker to balance volumes.

Home.heroBody: A shelf for browser experiments. The latest one uses GitHub Issues as storage for a 24-hour timeline danmaku wall.
Home.sampleBody: Sign in with GitHub, write plain-text danmaku into public issue comments, and replay messages on a local 24-hour timeline.
Home.motto: GitHub as storage, Vercel as proxy, the browser as the danmaku player.

heartCardEditor.title: Heart Block Editor
heartCardEditor.summary: Put text and one image into little blocks, then arrange them into a very obvious heart.

powerOnDetector.title: Power-on Detector
powerOnDetector.summary: Press a button to seriously check whether this device is powered on.

qrFileBeam.title: QR File Beam
qrFileBeam.summary: Slice a small file into QR frames, then scan it back on another device.

magicCamera.title: Magic Camera
magicCamera.summary: Cast tiny AR spells with hand tracking, webcam video, and Three.js particles.

miniOfficeWeb.title: Mini Office Web
miniOfficeWeb.summary: Preview PDF, DOCX, XLSX, and PPTX files locally, then export practical PDFs.

githubDanmaku.title: GitHub Timeline Danmaku
githubDanmaku.summary: Sign in with GitHub, send plain-text danmaku, and replay it on a local 24-hour timeline.

minesweeper.title: Animal Crossing Minesweeper
minesweeper.summary: Classic minesweeper in pastel meadow colours, plus a devil endless mode that grows a new block when you reach a boundary.

islandJuiceSort.title: Island Juice Sort
islandJuiceSort.summary: Sort layered fruit juice back into matching glass bottles with random, verified-solvable puzzles.

songjiangDuel.title: Wobbly Adou
songjiangDuel.summary: An Adou-guard word-defense game with soldier glyphs, skills, weapons, and general merging.

gifEditor.title: GIF Editor
gifEditor.summary: Import a GIF or WebM, key out the background with the eyedropper, trim, and export back to GIF or WebM.

HeartCard.metadataDescription: Edit text and an image to generate a heart-shaped block poster.
HeartCard.title: Heart Block Editor
HeartCard.description: Click any block on the canvas to edit it. The portrait block accepts an image, then you can export a PNG.
HeartCard.emptyImage: Upload an image on the right

PowerOn.title: {device} Power-on Detector
PowerOn.description: This tool uses browser, device, and graphics-rendering clues to seriously check whether your current device is powered on.
PowerOn.checking: Checking this {device}... checking... this may take a while.
PowerOn.result: Oh!!! Looks like your {device} is powered on.
PowerOn.metadataDescription: Seriously check whether your current device is powered on.

SongjiangDuel.metadataDescription: An Adou-guard word-defense game with brush-letter generals, active skills, passive skills, and weapons.
SongjiangDuel.title: Wobbly Adou
SongjiangDuel.noSelection: Reroll to recruit, then drag a word tile.
SongjiangDuel.victory: Adou holds steady. Guard duty succeeds.
SongjiangDuel.defeat: Adou buckles. The enemy breaks through.
SongjiangDuel.draw: Both sides collapse into glorious chaos.

QrFileBeam.metadataDescription: Frontend-only QR file batch transfer and reconstruction tool.
QrFileBeam.title: QR File Beam
QrFileBeam.description: Pick a file and the browser slices it into a scannable QR stream. Large files split into batches automatically — finish one batch, switch the sender to the next, and the receiver reassembles, previews, and downloads.
QrFileBeam.batchSizeHelp: Frames per batch. Smaller batches scan more reliably; raise this for fewer batch switches.
QrFileBeam.qrError: Could not generate this QR frame.
QrFileBeam.senderHint: Each batch ends with file metadata + batch metadata + data chunks + batch settlement. The last batch appends the file settlement. After a batch is acknowledged, switch the sender to the next batch — the receiver clears its current-batch buffer automatically.
QrFileBeam.emptySender: Pick an image, text, audio, video, or other common file. The QR sequence appears here.
QrFileBeam.cameraError: Could not open the camera. Check browser permissions or use HTTPS / localhost.
QrFileBeam.scanError: This frame could not be parsed. Keep aiming at the QR code.
QrFileBeam.batchArchived: ✓ Batch {batch} / {total} archived. Switch the sender to the next batch.
QrFileBeam.lastBatchArchived: ✓ Last batch archived. Waiting for the file settlement QR.
QrFileBeam.checksumFailed: Verification failed: file info, size, or SHA-256 checksum does not match.
QrFileBeam.completeWithFinal: File reconstruction complete. SHA-256 verification passed.
QrFileBeam.waitingMeta: Waiting for the file metadata QR.
QrFileBeam.noPreview: This file type cannot be previewed in the browser, but it can be downloaded.
QrFileBeam.receiverHint: Keep the QR code fully in view. When a batch is complete it's archived and its buffer is cleared — switch the sender to the next batch when prompted.
QrFileBeam.exportPdfHelp: PDF lays out the current batch or every batch as vector QR pages for printing or offline archival. The all-batches ZIP can grow large for big files — pick what you need.

Minesweeper.metadataDescription: Classic minesweeper in Animal Crossing meadow colours, plus an endless mode that grows a new block when you hit a boundary.
Minesweeper.title: Animal Crossing Minesweeper
Minesweeper.description: Reveal grassy tiles to flatten them into sand, with numbers hinting at the mines next door. Endless mode sprouts a fresh block of meadow each time your flood-fill reaches an edge.
Minesweeper.rulesHint: Left-click to reveal, right-click to flag (long-press on touch). Click a revealed number whose flags match it and the remaining neighbours auto-reveal.
Minesweeper.endlessHint: Endless: when a flood-fill reveal reaches the edge of a block (specifically, a 0-adjacent cell next to a neighbouring block), the next block sprouts. Drag to pan, wheel to zoom.

IslandJuiceSort.metadataDescription: Animal Crossing-inspired layered juice sorting puzzles that are randomly generated and verified solvable.
IslandJuiceSort.title: Island Juice Sort
IslandJuiceSort.description: The island drink stand got mixed up. Tap one bottle, then another, and pour matching top layers until every bottle holds one flavour.
IslandJuiceSort.rulesHint: You can pour into an empty bottle or onto the same top colour. Each board is shuffled at random and verified by a solver, so a real solution always exists.
IslandJuiceSort.dailyBody: Difficulty grows through more colours and bottles, while empty bottles keep room for planning.
IslandJuiceSort.verifiedBody: The generator keeps a replayable {steps}-move solution to filter bad boards.
IslandJuiceSort.orderBody: A later version can add villager orders: finish the requested flavours instead of sorting everything.

chain.name: Long River
chain.description: Solve one board, deal the next. Build streaks at your own pace; bail any time.
chain.tipBody: Switching difficulty resets your current streak. Best streak per difficulty is saved locally.

orders.name: Order Day
orders.description: Villagers queue up with single-bottle requests. Finish matching bottles fast, score climbs.
orders.rules: Complete a bottle whose colour matches an open order to auto-ship it. Patience drains over time; expired orders cost a small fee.
orders.rewardBody: Base reward {base} pts per order; up to {fast} when shipped quickly. Tier-up bonus {tierBonus}. Expired order: −{penalty}.
orders.tierBody: Every {every} fulfilled orders advances a tier: one more colour to juggle and a tighter patience timer.
orders.toolsBody: You start with two of each: skip-order, empty-bottle, and re-roll-bottle. Each tier-up restocks {gift} of every tool, up to a small reserve. ESC cancels a tool in progress.
orders.skipPrompt: Pick an order card to skip.
orders.refreshPrompt: Pick a bottle to re-roll its juice.

conveyor.name: Conveyor
conveyor.description: A new bottle slides onto the counter on a timer. Make room or the line jams.
conveyor.rules: Complete bottles to ship them away; only empty bottles can accept incoming juice. If the timer fires while every slot is full, the run ends.
conveyor.shipBody: A bottle that becomes a single full colour is automatically shipped out — slot frees up after a short delay.
conveyor.pressureBody: Interval starts at {start}s and shrinks by 0.6s per ship, down to a floor of {min}s. New colours unlock every five ships.

MagicCamera.metadataDescription: Browser-only hand tracking and Three.js particle spell toy.
MagicCamera.title: Magic Camera
MagicCamera.description: Open the camera, show one or two hands, and use simple gestures to cast particle spells over the live video.
MagicCamera.emptyStage: Start the camera to load the hand model and summon the spell layer.
MagicCamera.statusLoading: Loading camera, hand model, and WebGL scene.
MagicCamera.statusRunning: Show one or two hands in frame.
MagicCamera.statusNoHand: No hand found. Move into the camera view.
MagicCamera.statusError: Could not start the camera or hand model. Use HTTPS / localhost and allow camera access.

gestureHint.pinch: Pinch thumb and index finger to charge a bright orb.
gestureHint.open-palm: Open your hand to release a shockwave.
gestureHint.point: Point with one finger to push a particle beam.
gestureHint.circle: Draw a circle with your index finger to summon rings.

MiniOfficeWeb.metadataDescription: Browser-only preview and PDF export for PDF, DOCX, XLSX, and PPTX files.
MiniOfficeWeb.title: Mini Office Web
MiniOfficeWeb.description: A local office workbench for previewing PDF, DOCX, XLSX, and PPTX files with lazy renderers and practical PDF export.
MiniOfficeWeb.dropHint: PDF, DOCX, XLSX, XLSM, XLS, or PPTX. Files stay in this browser.
MiniOfficeWeb.emptyPreview: Pick a document to load only the renderer it needs.

GithubDanmaku.metadataDescription: Store plain-text danmaku as GitHub issue comments and replay them on a local-time 24-hour timeline.
GithubDanmaku.title: Timeline Danmaku
GithubDanmaku.description: Sign in with GitHub and send a plain-text danmaku. The page shows it locally first, then writes it to today's GitHub issue comment thread and syncs every 5 minutes.
GithubDanmaku.syncNote: Only today's messages in your current browser timezone are synced by default. Drag the timeline to replay earlier messages.
GithubDanmaku.missingWrite: Missing GitHub write token; showing local cache only
GithubDanmaku.loginFirst: Sign in with GitHub before sending
GithubDanmaku.playbackWindow: Playing danmaku from the last {minutes} minutes
GithubDanmaku.empty: No danmaku before this point yet

GifEditor.metadataDescription: Browser-only GIF and WebM editor with chroma-key background removal and re-export.
GifEditor.title: GIF Editor
GifEditor.description: Drop a GIF or WebM, pick the background colour with the eyedropper, then export back to GIF (transparent) or WebM.
GifEditor.featureChroma: Chroma-key background removal with tolerance and feather
GifEditor.featureTrim: Trim by start and end frame
GifEditor.featureExport: Re-export as GIF (transparent supported) or WebM
GifEditor.hint: Everything runs in your browser. Large clips may take a moment on slower devices.
GifEditor.uploadTitle: Drop a GIF or WebM here
GifEditor.uploadHint: or pick one from disk. Up to 240 frames are sampled from a WebM.
